global_rules.quick_mode_rule: When time is limited, keep prep shortened, complete power/primary strength first, then one accessory superset only.

progression_engine.week_1: Establish baseline loads and leave 2-3 reps in reserve unless otherwise noted.
progression_engine.week_2: Add 1 rep per set where prescribed or 2.5-5 lb upper / 5-10 lb lower if all sets met.
progression_engine.week_3: Push load progression while keeping target RIR.
progression_engine.week_4: Deload or pivot week depending on meso. Reduce volume 30-40% while maintaining bar speed.

readiness_rules.low_sleep_under_6_hours: Remove one accessory set from each later block and keep all lifts 1 RIR easier.
readiness_rules.joint_irritation: Swap offensive movement for listed substitution and avoid intensity techniques.

audit_summary.auditor_notes: Full program audit completed. Meso 1 (Foundation) retained unchanged — correctly programmed. Meso 2 and Meso 3 updated per Phase 2/3/4 audit findings. See meso-level audit_notes and day-level audit_changes fields for specific changes.
key_fixes: Push:pull ratio restored to ≥1.3:1 across all mesos via DB Incline restoration and Face Pull repositioning
Weighted Pull-Up promoted to primary strength block on M2 Day 1
BOR moved to M2 Day 3 where it gets fresh neurological exposure
Bench and Squat restructured from 1+4 sets to 1+3 sets in M2 to fit time budget
M3 primary strength structured in weekly undulating intensity wave rather than flat 3x3 throughout
Depth Jump to Broad Jump reduced from 4x2 to 3x2 in M3 — cannot simultaneously peak plyometric AND near-maximal strength
Med Ball Shot Put reduced from 5x3/side to 4x3/side in M3 — quality over volume for power expression
M3 Day 4 intervals reduced from 10x15s to 8x15s — was the highest set-count day in the program
M3 Day 5 RIR targets added throughout — missing RIR prescription creates junk volume or excessive fatigue
M3 Day 6 shoulder health restored from 4 sets to 6 sets — cut exactly when it was most needed
M2 Lateral Bound reduced from 3x4/side to 2x4/side — high-CNS reactive work trimmed in strength-bias meso
M2 Day 5 Calf Raise removed and total sets trimmed from 21 to 16 — 21 sets in 30min was physically unexecutable
Session time estimates corrected throughout to reflect actual rest + setup time
outstanding_recommendations_not_in_json: Add explicit week 4 and week 8 deload sessions as separate day structures — progression engine mentions deload but no session-level programming exists. Busy dads will not self-regulate without explicit instruction.
Add lateral epicondyle warning note for weeks 6-9 given cumulative elbow flexor load across Days 3/4/5/6
Consider adding a unilateral lower option (step-up or single-leg RDL) to M1 Day 3 accessories for athletes flagged with bilateral asymmetry at baseline

mesocycles.audit_notes: Meso 1 (Foundation) passed audit. Split logic, volume distribution, power placement, and shoulder health architecture are correctly programmed. Session time estimates are accurate.

Push:pull ratio restored to 1.3:1. Weighted Pull-Up promoted to primary. BOR moved to Day 3. DB Incline restored to accessories. Face Pull moved to prep. Bench restructured to 4 total sets. Lateral Bound trimmed to 2x4/side. Day 5 Calf Raise removed; total sets reduced to 16. Session time estimates corrected.

audit_changes: Face Pull moved from accessories to prep as daily shoulder primer — no RIR, movement quality only
BOR removed from Day 1 — moved to Day 3 where it gets honest spotlight after lower body
Weighted Pull-Up promoted from accessories to primary_strength block
Bench restructured: 1 top set + 3 backoffs = 4 total sets (was 5 sets — time budget exceeded)
DB Incline Press restored to accessories (was cut in original M2, causing push:pull to drop below 1.3:1)
Band External Rotation added to accessories as daily shoulder health floor

blocks.notes: Face Pull added here as shoulder primer — quality only, no RIR, no load chase

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: MOVED FROM ACCESSORIES — daily scapular primer, movement quality focus only, no RIR target

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.notes: Beat previous distance. Full reset each rep.

blocks.notes: Weighted Pull-Up promoted to primary — it earns honest neurological exposure here, not buried after 5 sets of heavy pressing

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: RESTRUCTURED: 1 top set + 3 backoffs = 4 total sets. Was 1+4=5 sets — primary block was running 7+ min over estimate.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: PROMOTED FROM ACCESSORIES — heavy vertical pull deserves primary placement. Load conservatively week 5, progress weekly.

blocks.notes: DB Incline restored to fix push:pull ratio. Band ER maintains shoulder health floor.

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: RESTORED — was removed in original M2, dropping push:pull below 1.3:1. Upper chest support and push volume balance.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Daily shoulder health floor — maintain throughout meso

audit_changes: No changes — Day 2 correctly programmed in original M2

exercises.name: 30 Yard Build-Up Sprint
exercises.notes: Slightly longer distance than M1, still controlled build

exercises.name: Zone 2 Bike or Rower
exercises.notes: Keep easy enough to support strength recovery. Nasal breathing if possible.

audit_changes: BOR moved from Day 1 to Day 3 primary — it now gets honest exposure after lower body, not after bench + pull-ups
BOR reduced to 3x5 (from 4x6) — still heavy, less competing fatigue from bench
RDL moved from primary to accessory tier — supports posterior chain without competing with top-set squat CNS load
Bulgarian Split Squat retained — critical for bilateral lower dominance problem
DB Overhead Press not restored here — push balance handled on Day 1 with DB Incline

exercises.name: Rotational Med Ball Throw
exercises.notes: Max rotational velocity. Full reset between reps.

blocks.notes: BOR now gets honest spotlight after lower body — not stacked behind bench and pull-ups

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: RESTRUCTURED: 1 top set + 3 backoffs = 4 total sets (matches Day 1 bench structure for consistency)

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.notes: MOVED FROM DAY 1 and REDUCED to 3x5. Gets full neurological freshness here. Load heavy with clean mechanics.

blocks.notes: RDL moved to accessories — still targets posterior chain but no longer competing with squat for primary CNS output

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Key unilateral lower work — addresses bilateral dominance deficit. Rear foot elevated, front shin vertical.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: MOVED TO ACCESSORY — posterior chain support without competing with top-set squat intensity

audit_changes: Lateral Bound reduced from 3x4/side to 2x4/side — high-CNS reactive work was over-represented in a strength-bias meso three days after heavy squats
Intervals unchanged at 6x20s/40s — correct reduction from M1

blocks.notes: Lateral Bound reduced — saves CNS for Days 1 and 3 which are the priority in this meso

exercises.name: Lateral Bound
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 3x4/side to 2x4/side. High-CNS reactive work trimmed in strength-bias meso. Clean landings, full reset.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Intervals
exercises.notes: Correctly reduced from M1 8x to 6x — maintain this

audit_changes: Standing Calf Raise removed — lowest priority movement, was costing 3 sets and 5+ minutes in an already dense session
Total working sets reduced from 21 to 16 — 21 sets at 50-60s rest in a 30-min estimate was physically unexecutable
DB Lateral Raise reduced from 4x12 to 4x12 (maintained) — delt work preserved as it serves the push:pull balance
Session time estimate corrected to reflect actual rest + setup time

blocks.notes: Calf Raise removed. DB Lateral Raise maintained as shoulder work supports push:pull balance and athletic look.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: CALF RAISE REMOVED — DB Lateral maintained. 4 sets preserved for delt volume.

audit_changes: No changes — Day 6 correctly programmed in original M2. Shoulder health at 6 sets is appropriate.

exercises.name: Easy Walk or Bike
exercises.notes: Recovery only — do not push pace

mesocycles.audit_notes: Depth Jump volume reduced to 3x2. Primary strength structured in weekly undulating intensity wave (not flat 3x3 throughout). Med Ball Shot Put reduced to 4x3/side. Day 4 intervals reduced from 10x15s to 8x15s. Day 5 RIR targets restored across all exercises. Day 6 shoulder health restored from 4 to 6 sets — critical during highest intensity phase.
mesocycles.rir_target: Weekly wave on primary lifts — see weekly_strength_wave. Accessories: RIR 2-3.

week_9.notes: Re-establish bar speed with slightly higher rep — feel the weight move fast

week_10.notes: Heavy triples — this is the money week for CNS peak

week_11.notes: Near-max effort — cluster sets optional on the double

week_12.notes: Peak expression — treat this as a test. Leave nothing for after.

audit_changes: Depth Jump to Broad Jump reduced from 4x2 to 3x2 with 100s rest — cannot simultaneously express maximal plyometric AND near-maximal strength in same session. Fewer reps, more intent per rep.
Bench Press restructured to weekly undulating wave (see weekly_strength_wave) — flat 3x3 at RIR 0-1 throughout gave no peaking arc and risked going to failure too early
DB Incline Press retained in accessories — push:pull maintenance
Cable Face Pull retained — shoulder health non-negotiable in performance meso

blocks.notes: REDUCED: 3x2 gives 6 maximal contacts with full intent. 4x2 was rushing the athlete and sandbagging quality.

exercises.name: Depth Jump to Broad Jump
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 4x2 to 3x2 — maximal reactive intent on every rep. Step off box, absorb, explode immediately. If landing is off, reset fully before next rep.

blocks.notes: Bench follows weekly undulating wave — see meso weekly_strength_wave for sets/reps/RIR by week

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: RESTRUCTURED to weekly undulating wave. W9:3x4@RIR1 | W10:3x3@RIR0-1 | W11:2x3+1x2@RIR0 | W12:1x2+1x1 peak. Bar speed is the priority — every rep must look fast.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.notes: Explosive concentric — snap the bar into the body

blocks.notes: Minimal but non-zero push support. Face Pull stays — shoulder health is most critical during max intensity phase.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health non-negotiable — do not remove even if pressed for time

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: Push:pull maintenance. Keep moderate load — this is not a performance set.

audit_changes: No changes — Day 2 correctly programmed in original M3

exercises.name: 20 Yard Acceleration Sprint
exercises.notes: Full intent. Full recovery. No sloppy reps.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Bike or Rower
exercises.notes: Slightly reduced from M2 to protect speed quality. Nasal breathing target.

audit_changes: Med Ball Shot Put reduced from 5x3/side to 4x3/side — performance meso requires maximal intent per rep, not high volume. High volume throws create oblique fatigue that compromises squat stability.
Back Squat restructured to same weekly undulating wave as bench (see weekly_strength_wave)
RIR targets added to accessory exercises (were missing in original M3 Day 3)

blocks.notes: REDUCED: 4x3/side = 24 total reps vs original 30. Each rep gets full reset and true maximal velocity.

exercises.name: Med Ball Shot Put
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 5x3/side to 4x3/side — max velocity each throw. High volume oblique fatigue was compromising subsequent squat stability.

blocks.notes: Squat follows same weekly undulating wave as bench — see meso weekly_strength_wave

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: RESTRUCTURED to weekly undulating wave. W9:3x4@RIR1 | W10:3x3@RIR0-1 | W11:2x3+1x2@RIR0 | W12:1x2+1x1 peak. Pristine form every rep — position over load.

audit_changes: Assault Bike Intervals reduced from 10x15s to 8x15s — original M3 Day 4 had the highest total set count (19 sets) in the entire program. This is the athletic support day, not the hardest day.
Work:rest ratio preserved at 1:3 (15s/45s) — correct quality signal maintained

exercises.name: Lateral Bound
exercises.notes: Reactive and controlled — quality of landing matters as much as distance

blocks.notes: REDUCED from 10x15s to 8x15s. 1:3 work:rest preserved. Day 4 was the highest set-count day in original M3 — that is wrong for an athletic support day.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Intervals
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 10 to 8 rounds. Max output each interval. If you can't go max, rest an extra round before starting.

audit_changes: RIR targets added to ALL exercises — original M3 Day 5 had no RIR prescribed, creating either junk volume (too easy) or excessive fatigue (too hard) with no intent guide
Session time estimate corrected from 20min to 25min to reflect realistic setup and transition

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.notes: RIR TARGET ADDED: aim for RIR 2-3. This is maintenance, not performance.

audit_changes: Shoulder health block RESTORED from 4 sets to 6 sets — original M3 cut shoulder health exactly when intensity is highest and shoulder stress is greatest. This is the opposite of correct periodization.
Band External Rotation: 2x15 → 3x15
Serratus Wall Slide: 2x10 → 3x10

blocks.notes: RESTORED to 6 sets — was cut to 4 in original M3. Meso 3 is the most shoulder-stressful phase. This is exactly when you need more cuff work, not less.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: RESTORED from 2x15 to 3x15. Quality rotation — no shoulder hiking.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: RESTORED from 2x10 to 3x10. Reach long at the top of every rep.

exercises.name: Easy Walk or Bike
exercises.notes: Recovery only — this is deliberate rest, not wasted time
